title: Colors in tabs + tab width
excerpt:
As we are able to change the colors of every item inside boards, it could be usefull to change the colors in the worflow tab so that we can sort the different boards/projects.

posts.author: Dmancer (Mancer Dorian )
posts.cookedHtml:
As we are able to change the colors of every item inside boards, it could be usefull to change the colors in the worflow tab so that we can sort the different boards/projects.

Sometimes, the workflow tab’s width isn’t enough to clearly read the title, adding a custom width cursor could be a great improvement !

posts.author: KarenA (Karen Aiken)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I too would love to be able to add colour or emojis to view tabs so they’re easier to quickly pick out, especially as we have a dozen or more views for a single board.
